# Evaluation harness dependencies. The harness is not published; these pins are
# deliberately loose because the harness caches every channel run to disk and the
# numbers of record live in results/, generated by a specific environment recorded
# there.
ir-datasets>=0.5.9
ir-measures>=0.3.6
bm25s>=0.2.6
scikit-learn>=1.4
sentence-transformers>=3.0
numpy>=1.26
scipy>=1.12
